---
title: Slides
---

<!-- GENERATED by tools/build-slides-page.R -- do not edit by hand. -->

Each lecture deck is embedded below. Click a deck and use its own controls
(or the arrow keys) to navigate, open it full screen, or download it.

## Lecture 1 &mdash; Introduction {#aef-1-introduction}

::: {.ratio .ratio-16x9 .slide-embed}
```{=html}
<iframe src="slides/aef-1-introduction.html" title="Lecture 1 &mdash; Introduction" loading="lazy" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

```{=html}
<a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" href="slides/aef-1-introduction.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open full screen &#8599;</a>
<a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" href="slides/aef-1-introduction.html" download>Download &#8595;</a>
```

## Lecture 2 &mdash; Portfolio Choice {#aef-2-portfolio-choice}

::: {.ratio .ratio-16x9 .slide-embed}
```{=html}
<iframe src="slides/aef-2-portfolio-choice.html" title="Lecture 2 &mdash; Portfolio Choice" loading="lazy" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

```{=html}
<a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" href="slides/aef-2-portfolio-choice.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open full screen &#8599;</a>
<a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" href="slides/aef-2-portfolio-choice.html" download>Download &#8595;</a>
```

## Lecture 3 &mdash; Multifactor Models And The Reproducibility Crisis {#aef-3-multifactor-models-and-the-reproducibility-crisis}

::: {.ratio .ratio-16x9 .slide-embed}
```{=html}
<iframe src="slides/aef-3-multifactor-models-and-the-reproducibility-crisis.html" title="Lecture 3 &mdash; Multifactor Models And The Reproducibility Crisis" loading="lazy" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

```{=html}
<a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" href="slides/aef-3-multifactor-models-and-the-reproducibility-crisis.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open full screen &#8599;</a>
<a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" href="slides/aef-3-multifactor-models-and-the-reproducibility-crisis.html" download>Download &#8595;</a>
```

## Lecture 4 &mdash; Machine Learning {#aef-4-machine-learning}

::: {.ratio .ratio-16x9 .slide-embed}
```{=html}
<iframe src="slides/aef-4-machine-learning.html" title="Lecture 4 &mdash; Machine Learning" loading="lazy" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

```{=html}
<a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" href="slides/aef-4-machine-learning.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open full screen &#8599;</a>
<a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" href="slides/aef-4-machine-learning.html" download>Download &#8595;</a>
```

## Lecture 5 &mdash; Volatility Estimation And Advanced Portfolio Choice {#aef-5-volatility-estimation-and-advanced-portfolio-choice}

::: {.ratio .ratio-16x9 .slide-embed}
```{=html}
<iframe src="slides/aef-5-volatility-estimation-and-advanced-portfolio-choice.html" title="Lecture 5 &mdash; Volatility Estimation And Advanced Portfolio Choice" loading="lazy" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

```{=html}
<a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" href="slides/aef-5-volatility-estimation-and-advanced-portfolio-choice.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open full screen &#8599;</a>
<a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" href="slides/aef-5-volatility-estimation-and-advanced-portfolio-choice.html" download>Download &#8595;</a>
```

## Lecture 6 &mdash; High Frequency Econometrics {#aef-6-high-frequency-econometrics}

::: {.ratio .ratio-16x9 .slide-embed}
```{=html}
<iframe src="slides/aef-6-high-frequency-econometrics.html" title="Lecture 6 &mdash; High Frequency Econometrics" loading="lazy" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

```{=html}
<a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" href="slides/aef-6-high-frequency-econometrics.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open full screen &#8599;</a>
<a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" href="slides/aef-6-high-frequency-econometrics.html" download>Download &#8595;</a>
```

## Mandatory Assignment 1 &mdash; Evaluation {#aef-mandatory-assignment-1-evaluation}

::: {.ratio .ratio-16x9 .slide-embed}
```{=html}
<iframe src="slides/aef-mandatory-assignment-1-evaluation.html" title="Mandatory Assignment 1 &mdash; Evaluation" loading="lazy" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

```{=html}
<a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" href="slides/aef-mandatory-assignment-1-evaluation.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open full screen &#8599;</a>
<a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" href="slides/aef-mandatory-assignment-1-evaluation.html" download>Download &#8595;</a>
```

## Mandatory Assignment 2 &mdash; Evaluation {#aef-mandatory-assignment-2-evaluation}

::: {.ratio .ratio-16x9 .slide-embed}
```{=html}
<iframe src="slides/aef-mandatory-assignment-2-evaluation.html" title="Mandatory Assignment 2 &mdash; Evaluation" loading="lazy" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

```{=html}
<a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" href="slides/aef-mandatory-assignment-2-evaluation.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open full screen &#8599;</a>
<a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" href="slides/aef-mandatory-assignment-2-evaluation.html" download>Download &#8595;</a>
```

```{=html}
<style>
  .slide-embed { border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color); border-radius: .375rem; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: .5rem; }
  .slide-embed iframe { width: 100%; height: 100%; border: 0; }
</style>
```
